title: Frontend Engineering
description: We build performant, accessible, pixel-precise interfaces using React, Next.js, and Vue — engineered for scale, not just shipped for demo day.

title: Backend & APIs
description: Robust, observable backend systems and APIs — REST, GraphQL, and event-driven architectures built to handle real production traffic.

title: .NET Development
description: Full-spectrum .NET engineering — from legacy modernization to greenfield builds on .NET 8, C#, and Azure-native services.

title: Cloud & DevOps
description: CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and cloud architecture on AWS, Azure, and GCP — built for resilience and cost-efficiency.

title: Mobile Engineering
description: iOS, Android, and cross-platform apps built with React Native and Flutter — shipped to app stores with real performance budgets.

title: Data & AI Integration
description: From data pipelines to LLM-powered features — we integrate AI capabilities into existing products without the science-project overhead.

title: Product Design
short: Design that ships, not just impresses.
description: UX research, product strategy, and high-fidelity design systems that hand off cleanly into engineering — no translation loss.

title: QA & Test Automation
description: End-to-end test automation, performance testing, and CI-integrated QA pipelines so releases stop being a leap of faith.
